metadata.notes: Real backtest engine on v11 triple-barrier predictions. Includes Kraken fees (taker 0.26%, maker 0.16%), slippage (0.05%/side), execution latency, 5k starting capital, reserve + pyramid rules. Compare to analyze_v11_filters CAGR numbers — those omit all frictions and will be higher. Cadence is read from each npz file; multi-cadence runs produce both per-cadence comparisons and a cadence ablation.
